'''lakuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foetation|foetation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-k-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foetation|foetation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lakuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lækiyith|lækiyith]] || [[word:lækiyij|lækiyij]] || [[word:lækiyish|lækiyish]] || [[word:lækiyi|lækiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lakukuyuth|lakukuyuth]] || [[word:lakukuyuj|lakukuyuj]] || [[word:lakukuyush|lakukuyush]] || [[word:lakukuyu|lakukuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lakuyuth|lakuyuth]] || [[word:lakuyuj|lakuyuj]] || [[word:lakuyush|lakuyush]] || [[word:lakuyu|lakuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lakufyuth|lakufyuth]] || [[word:lakufyuj|lakufyuj]] || [[word:lakufyush|lakufyush]] || [[word:lakufyuf|lakufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lakuyuthu|lakuyuthu]] || [[word:lakuyuju|lakuyuju]] || [[word:lakuyushu|lakuyushu]] || [[word:lakuyuku|lakuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lakuyuth|lakuyuth]] || [[word:lakuyuj|lakuyuj]] || [[word:lakuyush|lakuyush]] || [[word:lakuyu|lakuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lakuyuthul|lakuyuthul]] || [[word:lakuyujul|lakuyujul]] || [[word:lakuyushul|lakuyushul]] || [[word:lakuyukul|lakuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lakuyuthuthu|lakuyuthuthu]] || [[word:lakuyujuju|lakuyujuju]] || [[word:lakuyushushu|lakuyushushu]] || [[word:lakuyuku|lakuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lakuyuthun|lakuyuthun]] || [[word:lakuyujun|lakuyujun]] || [[word:lakuyushun|lakuyushun]] || [[word:lakuyukun|lakuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lakuyuthuoro|lakuyuthuoro]] || [[word:lakuyujuoro|lakuyujuoro]] || [[word:lakuyushuoro|lakuyushuoro]] || [[word:lakuyukuoro|lakuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
